title: froelichia braunii
intro: Froelichia braunii, also known as sand paper plant, is a type of succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Froelichia braunii include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and kidney problems, as well as its use as a treatment for certain types of poisoning. Froelichia braunii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional due to potential side effects.
